# Toro Movers

> Family-owned full-service moving company in Orlando, FL. Serving apartments, homes, and offices across Central Florida with upfront hourly pricing and no hidden fees. Labor-only loading is a secondary option when customers already have a truck or POD.

## Primary identity
- Brand: Toro Movers
- Category: Full-service moving company
- Location: Orlando and Central Florida

## Services (priority order)
- Full-service moving (crew + truck + protection + transport)
- Local and apartment moving
- Home and residential moving
- Storage moving
- Furniture moving
- Labor-only loading and unloading (U-Haul, PODS, rental trucks) — secondary
- Same-week moves when the schedule allows

## Key Facts
- Hourly pricing with 2-hour minimum (3 hours when a truck is included)
- No fuel surcharges, stair fees, elevator fees, or weekend premiums
- Bilingual crew (English and Spanish)
- Background-checked crew
- 4.9 stars on Google
- Owner-operated — no franchise hand-offs
- Phone: (689) 600-2720

## Service Area
Orlando, Kissimmee, Sanford, Altamonte Springs, Oviedo, Winter Park, Lake Mary, Clermont, Apopka, Lake Nona, Casselberry, Longwood, Maitland, Winter Garden, and 30+ Central Florida cities.

- https://toromovers.net — Homepage
- https://toromovers.net/full-service-moving — Full-service movers
- https://toromovers.net/apartment-movers-orlando-fl — Apartment movers Orlando FL
- https://toromovers.net/labor-only-moving — Labor-only (secondary)
- https://toromovers.net/quote — Get a quote
